text.title: Image Generation Tools Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to ship a production multi-provider image service.

step.name: template-library
step.action: Author prompt-templates.py mapping use_case → structured prompt (subject + style + lighting + composition + technical).

step.name: wire-providers
step.action: Implement an adapter per provider exposing a common .generate(prompt, params) → (image_bytes, revised_prompt, cost_usd).

step.name: cache-layer
step.action: Hash sha1(prompt + provider + canonical_json(params)); GET from S3 first; on miss generate + PUT.

step.name: fallback-chain
step.action: Order providers by cost or quality; on primary failure call next with same inputs; populate cache from whichever succeeds.

step.name: attribution
step.action: Emit per-call attribution event with provider_used + cost_usd + use_case + tenant_id.

step.name: audit
step.action: Append {ts, tenant_id, provider_used, input_hash, revised_prompt, storage_uri, cost_usd, fallback_count} to audit_log.jsonl.
